$comment: Flaky-test skip gate allowlist (ENG-OPS-002.R13 / QUAL-012, ADR-054 enforcement). Every entry's `reason` MUST satisfy the same ANNOTATION_PATTERN reference requirement as an inline `// ADR-054: <reference>` comment (see tools/scripts/flaky-test-skip-gate.ts) — this file is for skips that cannot be annotated in place, never a blanket bypass. Prefer an inline annotation over an allowlist entry whenever the file is safe to edit.

entries.reason: ADR-054: QUAL-013 — SAP ERP adapter suite is scheduled for deletion under ENG-OPS-002.R17, a parallel PR in the same remediation wave. Left untouched here (not annotated in-place) to avoid a merge conflict with R17. Remove this entry once R17 merges and deletes the file.
